items.title: IBM (IBM) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: What You Should Know
items.description: In the most recent trading session, IBM (IBM) closed at $249.98, indicating a -0.14% shift from the previous trading day.

items.title: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Expands Semiconductor Research With Tokyo Electron Partnership
items.description: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) recently announced the extension of its strategic partnership with Tokyo Electron (TEL), focusing on developing technologies essential for generative AI. This could have enhanced market confidence, driving a 14% increase in its stock price over the last quarter. During this period, IBM declared a stable $1.67 quarterly dividend and introduced AI-driven projects like the Granite 3.2 LLM, which align with market trends favoring AI innovations. Despite...

items.title: Tokyo Electron and IBM Renew Collaboration for Advanced Semiconductor Technology
items.description: Today, IBM and Tokyo Electron (TEL) announced an extension of their agreement for the joint research and development of advanced semiconductor technologies. The new 5-year agreement will focus on the continued advancement of technology for next-generation semiconductor nodes and architectures to power the age of generative AI.

items.title: TCW Relative Value Large Cap Fund Q4 2024 Commentary
items.description: The Fed lowered rates by 25 bps at its December meeting but forecasted fewer cuts (two versus four) in 2025 due to inflation concerns. Read more here.

items.title: Consulting Giants Offer Billions in Cuts to Federal Contracts. It Might Not Be Enough.
items.description: Accenture, Deloitte, IBM and other firms submitted proposed price concessions but are expected to be asked to dig deeper.

items.title: IBM must face discrimination claim from White male worker, judge says
items.description: IBM’s alleged plan to financially reward executives who achieved certain diversity goals could have incentivized the worker’s termination, Judge Hala Jarbou determined.
